title: Homatz Induction Stock Pot 24cm Dia, 5L Stainless Steel Pot with Glass Lid | Non-Stick Large Cooking Pot for Soups, Stews | Oven Safe Upto 200 °C - Casserole Dish Pot, Silver
features: Versatile 3-in-1 Pot: Made precisely from aluminium, our Homatz Cooking Pot is a versatile 3-in-1 solution, serving as a stockpot, saucepan, or soup pot. Its induction bottom ensures even heating for consistently delicious meals.

Multi-Hobs Compatibility - Whether you have a gas, electric, ceramic, or induction hobs, our cooking pot is ready to deliver outstanding results on any cooking surface. Plus, the glass lid with a steam release vent allows you to monitor your cooking with ease, ensuring your dishes retain their full flavor and moisture
Even Heat Distribution - The encapsulated base ensures even heat distribution, guaranteeing perfectly cooked meals every time. Say goodbye to unevenly cooked food, and hello to culinary perfection.
Easy Maintenance - Cleaning up is a breeze with our dishwasher-safe design. Spend less time scrubbing and more time enjoying your delicious creations.
Premium Quality Stainless Steel - Our cooking pot is crafted from high-quality, rust-proof stainless steel, assuring you of its long-lasting performance.
Induction-Friendly - Enjoy perfect heat diffusion and evenly cooked results on all stovetops, including induction, thanks to the extra-thick, high-impact bonded base.
Stylish Design - The pot comes with stylish stainless steel lids or glass lids with steam vents, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 All Hobs Supported 2 Features 3 Dimensions Easy to Clean Non-stick coating makes the pot easier to clean, as food and debris can be wiped away more easily than with a traditional pot. Master diverse dishes effortlessly with our stainless steel pot—ideal for hearty stews, savoury pasta, flavorful soups, and more. Its even heat distribution ensures perfection in risottos and one-pot wonders. Elevate your culinary journey with precision in every cook! Elegant Design An elegant and reliable design with easy-grip handles, making the pot easy to control. It features a flat bottom to ensure it sits securely on all types of hobs, including induction cooktops, gas, electric, and other heat sources.
